---
name: Principle feedback
about: Comment on one of the 7 conventions — agree, disagree, refine, or add nuance
title: "[Convention N] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

**Which convention?**
Convention I / II / III / IV / V / VI / VII (delete as appropriate)

**What's your take?**
What works, what doesn't, or what's missing from this convention?

**Your context**
Stack / project type / team size — so we can tell whether the friction is general or specific.

**Concrete example (optional)**
A snippet or file structure that illustrates your point.
